title: actinocephalus scytophyllus
intro: Actinocephalus scytophyllus, also known as the 'Cupped Button Flower', is a plant species within the family Asteraceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Actinocephalus scytophyllus can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various purposes.
